_note: Non-OpenRouter SKUs surfaced in the iOS picker. After Phase IM.3.1 (2026-05-15) decision: OpenRouter-only architecture (Path B). All audio/image generation now routes through OpenRouter chat-completions models (openai/gpt-audio, openai/gpt-image, google/gemini-2.5-flash-image (Nano Banana), etc.) — no separate direct-provider integrations on iOS. Veo and ElevenLabs cut: Veo lacks an OpenRouter route; ElevenLabs would have added a new vendor relationship the platform doesn't want.
